title: Interest Rate Policy
subtitle: Transparent and Fair Pricing
introduction: QuikkRed is committed to maintaining transparency in all its lending practices. This policy outlines the interest rates, fees, and charges applicable to our loan products.

rateStructure.title: Interest Rate Structure
rateStructure.description: Our interest rates are determined based on various factors including the loan type, tenure, borrower's creditworthiness, and market conditions.

lateFee.title: Late Payment Fee
lateFee.description: ₹500 or 2% of the overdue amount, whichever is higher

annualPercentageRate.title: Annual Percentage Rate (APR)
annualPercentageRate.description: The APR includes the interest rate plus all applicable fees and charges, providing a comprehensive view of the total cost of borrowing. APR ranges from 15% to 45% depending on the product and borrower profile.

disclosure.title: Disclosure
items: All interest rates are calculated on a reducing balance method
Actual rates may vary based on individual credit assessment
Rates are subject to change based on RBI guidelines and market conditions
Complete loan terms including interest rate will be provided in the loan agreement

footerNote: For any queries regarding interest rates or charges, please contact our customer support team.
